web-mobile-apps.title: Get Your App In Front Of Millions Who Actually Download
web-mobile-apps.description: Expert reviews. Editorial coverage. Social amplification. Newsletter blasts. Ranking placement. The complete visibility stack for your app launch.

ai-tools.title: Get Your AI Tool Discovered By Millions Ready to Adopt
ai-tools.description: Expert reviews. AI directory listing. Founder interviews. Comparison content. Social amplification. The full-stack promotion platform built for AI products.

agencies-service-providers.title: Get Your Agency Found By Clients Who Are Ready to Hire
agencies-service-providers.description: Verified agency profile. Expert showcase. Client interviews. Thought leadership content. The only platform that combines directory authority with editorial depth for service businesses.

directoryBenefits.title: Appeared in directory within 48 hours, no queue
directoryBenefits.description: Your listing goes live fast, categorised by platform type and use case so the right users find you organically.

directoryBenefits.title: Border highlight so users spot you instantly
directoryBenefits.description: Paid listings get a highlighted border in category pages — increasing click-through rates significantly compared to standard listings.

directoryBenefits.title: Dofollow backlink to boost your SEO
directoryBenefits.description: Your listing includes a quality dofollow link from The Web App Pro to your website — a direct authority signal for search engines.

directoryBenefits.title: Listing and traffic — forever
directoryBenefits.description: Unlike time-limited promotions, your product stays permanently listed and continues attracting organic discovery indefinitely.

reviewBenefits.title: In-depth written review published on our platform
reviewBenefits.description: Not a paid advertorial — a genuine editorial review covering your app's strengths, limitations, and who it's best for.

reviewBenefits.title: TWAP Certified badge you can embed on your site
reviewBenefits.description: Verified third-party social proof that increases conversion rates when placed on your landing page or app store listing.

reviewBenefits.title: Structured rating across UX, performance, and features
reviewBenefits.description: Scored out of 5 stars across four dimensions — giving users a fast, trustworthy signal before they click through to your product.

reviewBenefits.title: Evergreen SEO content that keeps driving traffic
reviewBenefits.description: Review articles rank in search engines for your product name and category keywords — bringing in organic traffic for years after publication.

web-mobile-apps.eyebrow: What happens when you list with us
web-mobile-apps.introText: No vague promises. Here's a concrete breakdown of what getting listed on The Web App Pro actually delivers for your mobile or web app.
web-mobile-apps.firstCardTitle: Listed in Our App Directory — Permanently
web-mobile-apps.firstCardDescription: Your app appears in our searchable, categorised directory the moment it's approved. Discoverable by users actively looking for apps like yours.
web-mobile-apps.secondCardTitle: A Real Expert Review — Not Just a Listing
web-mobile-apps.secondCardDescription: Our editorial team writes a thorough, unbiased review covering UX, functionality, pricing, and platform support. Fact-checked before publishing.

ai-tools.eyebrow: What happens when you list with us
ai-tools.headingHtml:
Exactly What Happens
When You List Your AI
Tool
ai-tools.introText: The AI space is crowded. Here's how listing on The Web App Pro gives your tool a genuine edge — with concrete deliverables, not vague promises.
ai-tools.firstCardTitle: Listed in Our Verified AI Tools Directory
ai-tools.firstCardDescription: Your AI tool appears in our searchable, verified AI directory under the right use-case category — discoverable by professionals actively seeking tools like yours.
ai-tools.secondCardTitle: An Expert AI Tool Review — Rigorous & Unbiased
ai-tools.secondCardDescription: Our editors evaluate your AI tool on capability, use-case fit, output quality, and pricing. Written for both technical and non-technical buyers.

agencies-service-providers.eyebrow: What happens when you list with us
agencies-service-providers.headingHtml:
Here's Exactly What
Your Agency Gets
agencies-service-providers.introText: The services market is fragmented. Here's how listing on The Web App Pro positions your agency as the credible, go-to choice in your niche.
agencies-service-providers.firstCardTitle: Listed in Our Verified Agency Directory
agencies-service-providers.firstCardDescription: Your agency appears in our curated directory under the right specialisation — discoverable by business owners actively seeking development, design, or AI consultancy services.
agencies-service-providers.secondCardTitle: An Expert Agency Showcase — Not Just a Profile
agencies-service-providers.secondCardDescription: Our editorial team writes a thorough agency showcase covering your service lines, team, portfolio highlights, and specialisations. Positioned as a trusted resource, not an ad.

web-mobile-apps.headingHtml:
Six Ways We Put Your
Product on the Map
web-mobile-apps.introText: Most platforms give you a listing. We give you a full distribution stack — every channel working in parallel the moment your product is featured.

cards.title: App Directory Listing
cards.description: Permanently listed in our curated directory under the right category. Searchable by platform, pricing model, and use case.

cards.title: Expert App Review
cards.description: A rigorous written review covering UX, functionality, performance, and value. Scored on our 5-star system with a TWAP Certified badge.

cards.title: Newsletter Feature
cards.description: "App of the Week" blast to 5,000+ opted-in subscribers who actively seek new apps to download and use.

cards.title: Social Media Campaign
cards.description: Multi-platform posts across LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Instagram, and Facebook — including carousel posts and community group sharing.

cards.title: Video Short Review
cards.description: 45-second video review of your app distributed to YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, and Facebook — the highest-engagement format for app discovery.

cards.title: Top Lists & Rankings
cards.description: Inclusion in our Best iOS/Android App reports and Top Product leaderboards — evergreen SEO content that compounds over time.

ai-tools.headingHtml:
Six Ways We Put Your
Product on the Map
ai-tools.introText: Most platforms give you a listing. We give you a full distribution stack — every channel working in parallel the moment your product is featured.

cards.title: Verified AI Directory Listing
cards.description: Listed in our "Everything AI" section — categorised by use case, model type, and pricing. Verified badge signals credibility to users evaluating tools.

cards.title: Expert AI Tool Review
cards.description: A rigorous editorial review evaluating capability, output quality, pricing fairness, and data privacy. Scored and certified — trust signals that convert.

cards.title: AI Newsletter Feature
cards.description: "AI Tool of the Week" feature in our newsletter — reaching subscribers who are actively evaluating and adopting AI tools for their workflows.

cards.title: Social Media Blast
cards.description: Multi-platform posts across LinkedIn, Twitter/X, and Instagram — targeting AI practitioners, founders, and early adopters in our community.

cards.title: Founder / CEO Interview
cards.description: In-depth founder interview published on our "Interviews & Success Stories" hub — positioning you as a thought leader, not just a tool vendor.

cards.title: AI Comparison & Rankings
cards.description: Inclusion in our "Best AI Tools" comparison articles and rankings — the content type with highest purchase intent in the AI category.

agencies-service-providers.headingHtml:
Six Ways We Put Your
Product on the Map
agencies-service-providers.introText: Most platforms give you a listing. We give you a full distribution stack — every channel working in parallel the moment your product is featured.

cards.title: Verified Agency Directory
cards.description: Listed in our verified agency directory, categorised by specialisation (AI, mobile, web, design, marketing). Verified badge builds immediate trust with potential clients.

cards.title: Expert Agency Showcase
cards.description: A detailed editorial showcase covering your services, methodology, team credentials, and portfolio. Written to convert — not just inform.

cards.title: Founder / CEO Interview
cards.description: In-depth CEO interview published on our interviews hub — establishing your agency leader as a thought leader in your space, not just a vendor.

cards.title: Newsletter Feature
cards.description: "Agency of the Month" feature in our newsletter — reaching business owners, founders, and decision-makers who are actively evaluating service partners.

cards.title: Social Media Campaign
cards.description: Multi-platform promotion across LinkedIn (primary), Twitter/X, and Instagram — targeting business decision-makers with carousel posts and case study content.

cards.title: Case Study & Success Stories
cards.description: A published case study featuring one of your client success stories — the most persuasive format for converting prospective agency clients.

web-mobile-apps.introText: Five clear steps. Zero friction. You focus on building — we handle the visibility.

steps.title: Submit
steps.description: Fill out the product form with your app details, store URL, and promotion goals.

steps.title: Review
steps.description: Our editors test your app and write a thorough, unbiased review.

steps.title: Go Live
steps.description: Your listing, review article, and TWAP badge go live on the platform.

steps.title: Amplify
steps.description: Newsletter blast, social campaign, and video review launch simultaneously.

steps.title: Compound
steps.description: Organic search, directory traffic, and referral links keep driving long-term users.

ai-tools.introText: Five clear steps. Zero friction. You focus on building — we handle the visibility.

steps.title: Submit Tool
steps.description: Share your AI tool’s details, positioning, use cases, and target audience.

steps.title: Editorial Review
steps.description: Our AI-experienced editors test your tool and write a thorough unbiased evaluation.

steps.title: Go Live
steps.description: Your listing, review, and AI Certified badge go live in the Everything AI hub.

steps.title: Amplify
steps.description: Newsletter feature, social campaign, and founder interview launch in sequence.

steps.title: Compound
steps.description: Comparison content, rankings, and evergreen search traffic keep growing your reach.

agencies-service-providers.introText: Five clear steps. Zero friction. You focus on building — we handle the visibility.

steps.title: Submit Agency
steps.description: Share your agency profile, specialisations, team details, and portfolio highlights.

steps.title: Editorial Review
steps.description: Our team researches your agency and writes a comprehensive showcase article.

steps.title: Go Live
steps.description: Your agency profile, showcase, and verified badge go live in our directory.

steps.title: Amplify
steps.description: Newsletter feature, LinkedIn campaign, and CEO interview are published in sequence.

steps.title: Generate Leads
steps.description: Inbound enquiries arrive from clients who already read your showcase and trust your credentials.
